Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Defendant's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to dismiss plaintiff's complaint" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

The City and County of San Francisco's unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
